spec.expr: avg(openweathermap_forecast_temperature_celsius{forecast_type="hourly", offset_hours="0"} or openweathermap_forecast_temperature_celsius{forecast_type="hourly", offset_hours="1"} offset 1h or openweathermap_forecast_temperature_celsius{forecast_type="hourly", offset_hours="2"} offset 2h or openweathermap_forecast_temperature_celsius{forecast_type="hourly", offset_hours="3"} offset 3h or openweathermap_forecast_temperature_celsius{forecast_type="hourly", offset_hours="6"} offset 6h or openweathermap_forecast_temperature_celsius{forecast_type="hourly", offset_hours="12"} offset 12h or openweathermap_forecast_temperature_celsius{forecast_type="hourly", offset_hours="24"} offset 24h) by (offset_hours)

avg(openweathermap_forecast_rain_depth_meters{forecast_type="hourly", offset_hours="0"} or openweathermap_forecast_rain_depth_meters{forecast_type="hourly", offset_hours="1"} offset 1h or openweathermap_forecast_rain_depth_meters{forecast_type="hourly", offset_hours="2"} offset 2h or openweathermap_forecast_rain_depth_meters{forecast_type="hourly", offset_hours="3"} offset 3h or openweathermap_forecast_rain_depth_meters{forecast_type="hourly", offset_hours="6"} offset 6h or openweathermap_forecast_rain_depth_meters{forecast_type="hourly", offset_hours="12"} offset 12h or openweathermap_forecast_rain_depth_meters{forecast_type="hourly", offset_hours="24"} offset 24h) by (offset_hours)

avg(openweathermap_forecast_snow_depth_meters{forecast_type="hourly", offset_hours="0"} or openweathermap_forecast_snow_depth_meters{forecast_type="hourly", offset_hours="1"} offset 1h or openweathermap_forecast_snow_depth_meters{forecast_type="hourly", offset_hours="2"} offset 2h or openweathermap_forecast_snow_depth_meters{forecast_type="hourly", offset_hours="3"} offset 3h or openweathermap_forecast_snow_depth_meters{forecast_type="hourly", offset_hours="6"} offset 6h or openweathermap_forecast_snow_depth_meters{forecast_type="hourly", offset_hours="12"} offset 12h or openweathermap_forecast_snow_depth_meters{forecast_type="hourly", offset_hours="24"} offset 24h) by (offset_hours)

spec.title: Humidity and Cloud Cover Stddev at $forecast_hour:00

spec.name: forecast_offset
spec.label: Forecast offset
spec.description: Smallest available forecast offset for the selected forecast hour.
